title: Web pilot operations runbook

daily_operations.operator_action: Create pilot accounts, verify Supabase Auth access, and administer the baseline assessment.
daily_operations.learner_activity: Sign in, confirm the web pilot opens, and complete the A1 pre-test.
daily_operations.completion_signal: All five learners have a linked profile and baseline score.

daily_operations.operator_action: Confirm L01 is available and monitor the first lesson session for each learner.
daily_operations.learner_activity: Complete L01 greetings and introductions through the web pilot.
daily_operations.completion_signal: Each active learner has a completed L01 adaptive result.

daily_operations.operator_action: Check L02 access, monitor submission quality, and review the admin dashboard.
daily_operations.learner_activity: Complete L02 verb to be practice and read the adaptive result.
daily_operations.completion_signal: L02 submissions appear in the admin overview.

daily_operations.operator_action: Confirm L03 content loads and compare progress against the first two lessons.
daily_operations.learner_activity: Complete L03 numbers and colors practice.
daily_operations.completion_signal: L03 attempts and outcomes are visible to the operator.

daily_operations.operator_action: Monitor L04 and record only educational observations about family vocabulary gaps.
daily_operations.learner_activity: Complete L04 family vocabulary and simple sentence practice.
daily_operations.completion_signal: L04 result is saved for each participating learner.

daily_operations.operator_action: Run the L05 session and check that recommendations remain aligned with AIM decisions.
daily_operations.completion_signal: Recommendation actions match resolved AIM decisions.

daily_operations.operator_action: Use the rest day for admin review and follow-up with learners who missed a session.
daily_operations.learner_activity: No new lesson; complete any missed lesson from days 1 through 5.
daily_operations.completion_signal: Missed-session list is reviewed and follow-up is logged.

daily_operations.operator_action: Start week two with L06 and check retention movement from week one skills.
daily_operations.completion_signal: Week two starts with current retention data visible.

daily_operations.operator_action: Monitor L07 question formation and watch for prerequisite gap signals.
daily_operations.completion_signal: L07 prerequisite gaps are reviewed without increasing difficulty manually.

daily_operations.operator_action: Run L08 and confirm home and city vocabulary evidence is captured.
daily_operations.learner_activity: Complete L08 home and city vocabulary practice.
daily_operations.completion_signal: L08 completion is visible in the admin dashboard.

daily_operations.operator_action: Run L09 and check reading comprehension results for safe review recommendations.
daily_operations.completion_signal: Reading comprehension results are saved and review guidance is present.

daily_operations.operator_action: Run L10 review and confirm all learners are ready for post-test scheduling.
daily_operations.learner_activity: Complete L10 mixed review before final measurement.
daily_operations.completion_signal: Each active learner has either completed L10 or has a clear missed-session note.

daily_operations.operator_action: Reserve the day for catch-up sessions and final data quality checks.
daily_operations.learner_activity: Complete any missed week two lesson or rest before the post-test.
daily_operations.completion_signal: No unresolved data quality gap remains before the post-test.

daily_operations.operator_action: Administer the post-test and export the pilot measurement artifacts.
daily_operations.learner_activity: Complete the A1 post-test using the same assessment as the baseline.
daily_operations.completion_signal: Post-test scores and required exports are complete.

issue_protocols.operator_response: Verify Supabase Auth account status, reset password if needed, and confirm the backend student link.
Retry once, capture the session id, and check whether attempts or audit events were saved.
Pause new difficulty exposure, keep language educational, and allow a review or rest session.
Compare admin dashboard rows with expected lesson completion and record the missing artifact.

review_cadence: Daily operator review after the last learner session.
Mid-pilot review after day 6 to confirm retention and missing-session status.
Closeout review after day 13 to compare pre-test and post-test score gain.
closeout_checklist: Confirm all five learners have a baseline assessment record.
Confirm all five learners have a post-test record or a documented absence.
Export session attempts without adding any clinical interpretation.
Export recommendations and outcomes for effectiveness review.
Compare recommendation actions with resolved AIM decisions where available.
Summarize learning gain, completion, recommendation effectiveness, and data gaps.
Store the pilot summary with educational observations only.
